statement: The coupled stiffness variation S ~ c_x grad A · grad B_s yields q_action = -(c_x/c_s) as a reduced symbolic result. The variation is a real SymPy computation. It derives the form of q but not the ratio c_x/c_s itself. The ratio origin is the next open bottleneck. This is provisional until a symmetry/normalization/conservation origin for c_x/c_s is established.

messages: Tier 2 claim lacks reason, provenance, evidence, or obligation links.
